citation.description: show_ticket calls on 4e19, 7c84, e7e0, fde0, 46f0, a3db all returned status: closed with completion-verifier attestations. Ticket comment lists all six with signed attestations.

build_payload emits plan_review_result_v2 with evidence, scenarios, block_threshold, blocking_enabled per finding and full coaching {move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, coaching}. code_review/sidecar.py emits code_review_result_v2 pooling all four buckets. Integration test at tests/unit/workflow/test_plan_review_workflow.py:368 validates the full emit path.

criteria.criterion: After this epic, a freshly-run plan-review and code-review each write a *_v2 sidecar whose payload contains every pass-1 finding across all buckets with its pass-2 verification, its pass-3 validity/impact/priority/decision/reason, the resolved numeric block_threshold, and the pass-4 coaching. Oracle: an integration test runs a review and asserts on the emitted event JSON.

citation.description: build_payload branches on PASS to emit completion_verifier_pass_v1 schema with criteria[]. latest_pass_record reader exists. Test test_pass_close_persists_criteria_record at tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py:597 drives the full gate path and asserts the emitted record. test_audit_completion_v2.py tests the sidecar contract and pydantic model round-trip.

criteria.criterion: A completion-verification PASS emits a per-criterion audit record. Oracle: a test asserting on the emitted completion event.

citation.description: audit_trail() aggregates plan_reviews (all_review_results newest-first), completion (attestation+sidecar), and code_reviews (via relates_to). MCP tool registered at _mcp_reads.py:121 as READ_ONLY. CLI at _cli/_audit_commands.py. Help text at _cli/help/audit.txt. All three surfaces tested in tests/unit/test_audit_read.py including full-history, bare-ticket, CLI subprocess, and MCP tool tests.

criteria.criterion: The audit read layer returns the full retained history for a ticket and its relates_to-linked code reviews. Oracle: an integration test seeding a ticket's histories and asserting the aggregate contains all of them.
